results.rendered_html:
avarohin a. Descending.
— m. (hī) N. of the Indian fig-tree (vaṭa).
— ṇī A particular condition (daśā) brought about by a particular position of the stars; uccāṃgapaṃcabhasthasya daśā syādavarohiṇī .. tasyāmalpamavāpnoti phalaṃ kleśācchubhaṃ naraḥ ...
